Speaker 1: ...I feel a little sneezy. And now I- Excuse me, excuse me! Yeah, noisy boys! Is it something that you would like to share with the entire group?
noisy boy: No. No, that's- that's okay.
Speaker 1: Well, c'mon, if it's important enough to discuss while I'm playing, then I assume it's important enough for everyone else to hear!
Speaker 3: That guy's going home with a note!
noisy boy: Noth- I was- I was just saying to my-
Speaker 1: Could you speak up please?
noisy boy: Sorry, I wa- I was just saying to my friend that I thought you were the most beautiful woman that I'd ever seen in my- in my life. And then he said that- you said you thought
noisy boy: Daryl Hannah.
noisy boy: Daryl Hannah was the most beautiful woman that he'd ever seen in his life and I said yeah, I liked her in Splash, a lot, but not so much in- in Wall Street, I thought she had kind of a
noisy boy: Hard quality.
noisy boy: -hard quality. And uh, while Daryl Hannah is beautiful in a conventional way, you are luminous with a kind of a delicate grace. Then, uh, that-that-that's when you started yelling.
Speaker 1: Okay, we're gonna take a short break.
